2604.18478.title: WorldDB: A Vector Graph-of-Worlds Memory Engine with Ontology-Aware Write-Time Reconciliation
2604.18478.paper_summary: Persistent memory is the bottleneck separating stateless chatbots from long-running agentic systems. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) over flat vector stores fragments facts into chunks, loses cross-session identity, and has no first-class notion of supersession or contradiction. Recent bitemporal knowledge-graph systems (Graphiti, Memento, Hydra DB) add typed edges and valid-time metadata, but the graph itself remains flat: no recursive composition, no content-addressed invariants on nodes, and edge types carry no behavior beyond a label. We present WorldDB, a memory engine built on three commitments: (i) every node is a world -- a container with its own interior subgraph, ontology scope, and composed embedding, recursive to arbitrary depth; (ii) nodes are content-addressed and immutable, so any edit produces a new hash at the node and every ancestor, giving a Merkle-style audit trail for free; (iii) edges are write-time programs -- each edge type ships on_insert/on_delete/on_query_rewrite handlers (supersession closes validity, contradicts preserves both sides, same_as stages a merge proposal), so no raw append path exists. On LongMemEval-s (500 questions, ~115k-token conversational stacks), WorldDB with Claude Opus 4.7 as answerer achieves 96.40% overall / 97.11% task-averaged accuracy, a +5.61pp improvement over the previously reported Hydra DB state-of-the-art (90.79%) and +11.20pp over Supermemory (85.20%), with perfect single-session-assistant recall and robust performance on temporal reasoning (96.24%), knowledge update (98.72%), and preference synthesis (96.67%). Ablations show that the engine's graph layer -- resolver-unified entities and typed refers_to edges -- contributes +7.0pp task-averaged independently of the underlying answerer.
2604.18478.paper_summary_zh: 持久記憶是將無狀態聊天機器人與長期運行的智能系統分開的瓶頸。檢索增強生成（RAG）在平面向量存儲上將事實分割成片段，失去了跨會話的身份，並且沒有超越或矛盾的首級概念。最近的雙時間知識圖系統（Graphiti、Memento、Hydra DB）增加了類型邊和有效時間元數據，但圖本身仍然是平面的：沒有遞歸組合，節點上沒有內容地址不變性，邊類型除了標籤之外不承載任何行為。我們提出了WorldDB，一個基於三個承諾的記憶引擎：（i）每個節點都是一個世界——一個擁有自己內部子圖、範疇本體和組合嵌入的容器，遞歸到任意深度；（ii）節點是內容地址的且不可變的，因此任何編輯都會在節點和每個祖先上產生一個新的哈希，免費提供Merkle風格的審計追蹤；（iii）邊是寫入時間程序——每個邊類型都附帶on_insert/on_delete/on_query_rewrite處理程序（超越關閉有效性，矛盾保留雙方，same_as階段合併提案），因此不存在原始附加路徑。在LongMemEval-s（500個問題，約115k-token對話堆疊）上，WorldDB與Claude Opus 4.7作為回答者達到96.40%的整體/97.11%的任務平均準確率，較之前報告的Hydra DB最先進技術（90.79%）提高了+5.61個百分點，較Supermemory（85.20%）提高了+11.20個百分點，具有完美的單會話助手回憶和在時間推理（96.24%）、知識更新（98.72%）和偏好綜合（96.67%）上的穩健表現。消融實驗顯示，該引擎的圖層——解析器統一實體和類型化的refers_to邊——獨立於底層回答者，對任務平均貢獻了+7.0個百分點。
2604.18478.author: Harish Santhanalakshmi Ganesan et.al.
